name: Chocolate Covered Potato Chips
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Sweet or milk chocolate, chopped finely
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 6 ounces of chocolate.
2. Remove from heat.
3. While the chocolate is still hot, add the remaining 2 ounces of chocolate in three additions, stirring until each addition is completely melted before adding the next.
4. Dip the potato chips one at a time into the chocolate, coating completely and lifting with a small fork.
5. Shake off excess chocolate by lightly tapping the fork on the edge of the bowl.
6. Remove any drips from the bottom by running the fork across the edge of the bowl.
7. Slide the chips onto a cookie sheet lined with parchment or wax paper.
8. Allow to cool until solid.
9. Let chips sit at room temperature or in the refrigerator. Makes two dozen chips, about 12 servings.
